/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/flowforge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowforge.dir/src/render/BitmapFont.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowforge.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowforge.dir/src/ui/InputController.cpp.o -o flowforge   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib libflowforge_core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib
